charge_up.name: Charge-Up
charge_up.description: Must use Primary Action on consecutive turns to charge before using attack.

variants.name: Extended Charge
variants.description: Must charge for two turns before using.

modifiers.name: Triple Charge
modifiers.description: Must charge three turns before using.

modifiers.name: Cascade Failure
modifiers.description: If interrupted during any charge turn, lose ability for rest of combat.

modifiers.name: Escalating Exposure
modifiers.description: Each charge turn reduces your Durability by 5.

variants.name: Rooted While Charging
variants.description: Cannot move between charge-up and release.

modifiers.name: Immobilized
modifiers.description: Cannot move until end of turn after releasing attack.

modifiers.name: Anchored
modifiers.description: If moved from position by any effect, lose charge.

modifiers.name: Melee
modifiers.description: The attack you are making is a melee attack.

variants.name: Concentration
variants.description: Lose charge if you take damage or gain conditions.

modifiers.name: Fragile Concentration
modifiers.description: Concentration breaks if any character moves adjacent to you.

modifiers.name: Cascade Failure
modifiers.description: If concentration broken, you cannot attempt any attack with Concentration for rest of combat.

modifiers.name: Proximity Sensitivity
modifiers.description: Concentration breaks if any character moves within 5 spaces of you.

variants.name: Exposed While Charging
variants.description: Avoidance reduced by 2×Tier while charging.

modifiers.name: Fragile
modifiers.description: Avoidance becomes 0 while charging, all attacks are critical hits.

modifiers.name: Beacon
modifiers.description: All enemies within 30 spaces know your exact location while charging.

modifiers.name: Vulnerable
modifiers.description: Take double damage from all sources while charging.

variants.name: Power Lock
variants.description: Disable specific defensive ability while charging, gain points equal to that ability's cost.

modifiers.name: Extended Lock
modifiers.description: Disabled ability remains unusable until end of next turn.

modifiers.name: Multiple Lock
modifiers.description: Disable second defensive ability, gain its cost in points.

modifiers.name: System Failure
modifiers.description: Requires Concentration - If interrupted, all locked abilities unusable for rest of combat.

variants.name: Focused Charging
variants.description: Must also spend Quick Action on charge and release turns.

modifiers.name: Total Focus
modifiers.description: Must spend Primary Action, Quick Action, and Movement on charge turns.

modifiers.name: Ally Coordination
modifiers.description: Adjacent ally must attack same target you're charging against or charge fails.

modifiers.name: Reaction Delay
modifiers.description: Cannot use Reactions while charging, gain points equal to cost of reaction abilities you have purchased.

reserves.name: Reserves
reserves.description: Can only be used 3 times per combat. Regain all uses after combat ends.

variants.name: Reserves 2
variants.description: Reduce to 2 uses per combat.

modifiers.name: Reserves 1
modifiers.description: Reduce to 1 use per combat.

modifiers.name: Extended Recovery
modifiers.description: Regain uses after full rest instead of after combat, once per day.

variants.name: Volatile Uses
variants.description: Each time you take damage, lose 1 use.

modifiers.name: Condition Trigger
modifiers.description: Each time you gain a condition, lose 1 use.

modifiers.name: Critical Failure
modifiers.description: If you roll a natural 1 on any d20, lose 1 use.

modifiers.name: Life Drain
modifiers.description: If out of uses, and you would lose 1, take 15 damage instead.

variants.name: Shared Pool
variants.description: Multiple special attacks share same use pool, total uses divided among them, +1 use to the pool for each special attack added.

modifiers.name: Reduced Reserves
modifiers.description: Reduce pool by 1 use.

modifiers.name: Pool Drain
modifiers.description: If any attack in pool misses, remove an extra use.

modifiers.name: Cascade Lock
modifiers.description: If any attack in pool misses, no attacks in pool can be used for 1 turn.

variants.name: Steady
variants.description: Cannot use until turn 3 of combat.

modifiers.name: Patient
modifiers.description: Cannot use until turn 5 of combat.

modifiers.name: Unhealthy
modifiers.description: Must be below half HP to use.

modifiers.name: Timid
modifiers.description: Cannot use unless you are at full hit points and are not affected by any conditions.

cooldown.name: Cooldown
cooldown.description: Cannot use again for 1 turn after use.

variants.name: Cooldown 2
variants.description: Cannot use again for 2 turns after use.

modifiers.name: Cooldown 3
modifiers.description: Cannot use again for 3 turns after use.

modifiers.name: Permanent Injury
modifiers.description: Each use of this limit, permanantly increases all cooldown cooldown periods by 1 turn, until you take a full rest.

modifiers.name: Fates
modifiers.description: Roll a d4-1 when the attack is made, the cooldown is extended by the result.

variants.name: Failure Extension
variants.description: If attack misses or fails effect, cooldown period increases by 1 turn.

modifiers.name: Doubling Failure
modifiers.description: If attack misses or fails effect, cooldown period increases by 1 turn.

variants.name: Shared Cooldown
variants.description: Choose 2 other of your special attacks, they can't be used while you are cooling down from this attack.

modifiers.name: Increased Cooldown
modifiers.description: Choose 1 of your more special attacks, they can't be used while you are cooling down from this attack.

modifiers.name: Mass Cooldown
modifiers.description: All of your special attacks cannot be used while you are cooling down from this attack.

variants.name: Death Proximity
variants.description: Cooldown increases by 1 turn for every 25 HP below maximum.

modifiers.name: Trigger Extension
modifiers.description: Taking damage or gaining conditions adds 1 turn to current cooldown.

modifiers.name: Condition Spiral
modifiers.description: Conditions aquired last until the end of your cooldown period.

variants.name: Healthy
variants.description: Your cooldowns don't go down unless you are above 50 HP and not affected by any advanced conditions.

modifiers.name: Pinnacle of Health
modifiers.description: Your cooldowns don't go down unless you are at max HP and not affected by any conditions.

modifiers.name: Timid
modifiers.description: You cannot use this attack unless you are at max HP and not affected by any conditions.

unreliable.name: Unreliable
unreliable.description: Roll d20 before use; if under 5, attack fails and action is wasted.

variants.name: Unreliable 10
variants.description: Must roll 10+ or attack fails.

modifiers.name: Unreliable 15
modifiers.description: Must roll 15+ or attack fails.

modifiers.name: Unreliable 20
modifiers.description: Must roll 20 or attack fails.

modifiers.name: Double Check
modifiers.description: Must make reliability check twice, both must succeed.

variants.name: Stress Breakdown
variants.description: Reliability DC increases by 1 each turn of combat.

modifiers.name: Rapid Degradation
modifiers.description: Reliability DC increases by an additional 1 each turn of combat.

modifiers.name: Health Dependent
modifiers.description: DC increases by 1 for every 10 HP missing.

modifiers.name: Fearful
modifiers.description: DC increases by 5 if an enemy is adjacent to you.

variants.name: Equipment Dependent
variants.description: You have a specific, noticeable and disarmable item, in order to do any attack. There needs to be a reason, you wouldn't always have this item on you. (discuss with GM)

modifiers.name: Fragile Gear
modifiers.description: If you fail the Unreliable roll, the item breaks and won't be fixed until you spend 8 hours, or meet another specified condition (discuss with GM).

modifiers.name: Maintenance
modifiers.description: Equipment breaks if attack fails, requires action to repair.

variants.name: Cascading Failure
variants.description: Each failure increases next reliability DC by 5.

modifiers.name: Spread Effect
modifiers.description: Failed checks increase DC for all your special attacks.

modifiers.name: Critical Cascade
modifiers.description: Failures in combat make ability unusable for rest of session.

variants.name: Attrition
variants.description: When unreliable roll fails, take 15 damage.

modifiers.name: Attrition 2
modifiers.description: When unreliable roll fails, take an additional 15 damage.

modifiers.name: Concussive Kickback
modifiers.description: When unreliable roll fails, gain Stun condition, until the start of your next turn.

modifiers.name: Exhaustive
modifiers.description: When unreliable roll fails, you must spend an effort or fall unconscious.

combo_move.name: Combo Move
combo_move.description: You must have hit an enemy on your last turn.

variants.name: Revenge
variants.description: You must have done damage on inflicted a condition on your last turn.

modifiers.name: Kill History
modifiers.description: You must have defeated an enemy on your last turn.

modifiers.name: Perfect Opening
modifiers.description: You must have critically hit on your last turn.

modifiers.name: Follow-Up
modifiers.description: You must hit the same enemy as you did last turn.

variants.name: Switch Hitter
variants.description: Can only target enemies you have not damaged this combat.

modifiers.name: First Blood
modifiers.description: Can only target enemies no ally has damaged this combat.

modifiers.name: Finishing Move
modifiers.description: Can only target enemies below half max HP.

variants.name: Ally Setup
variants.description: Ally must have hit the same enemy you're about to attack this turn.

modifiers.name: Coordination
modifiers.description: Ally attack must have damaged or inflicted a condition on the same enemy you're about to attack this turn.

modifiers.name: Perfect Teamwork
modifiers.description: Must be a specific Ally, chosen when limit taken.

variants.name: Steady
variants.description: Cannot use until turn 3 of combat.

modifiers.name: Patient
modifiers.description: Cannot use until turn 5 of combat.

variants.name: Escalation
variants.description: Cannot use until an ally is below half HP.

modifiers.name: Desperation
modifiers.description: Cannot use until ally is unconscious.

variants.name: Set Up
variants.description: Must have hit with a specific special attack (chosen when limit taken).

modifiers.name: Solid Set Up
modifiers.description: Must have damaged or inflicted a condition with a specific special attack (chosen when limit taken).

modifiers.name: Perfect Opening
modifiers.description: Must have critically hit with specific special attack.

unhealthy.name: Unhealthy
unhealthy.description: Can only use when below max HP.

variants.name: Unhealthy 2
variants.description: Can only use when at 75 HP or below.

modifiers.name: Unhealthy 3
modifiers.description: Can only use when at 50 HP or below.

modifiers.name: Unhealthy 4
modifiers.description: Can only use when at 25 HP or below.

modifiers.name: Unhealthy 5
modifiers.description: Can only use when at 0 HP or below.

variants.name: Fresh Wound 1
variants.description: Must have taken 15+ damage since the end of your last turn to use.

modifiers.name: Fresh Wound 2
modifiers.description: Must have taken 30+ damage since the end of your last turn to use.

modifiers.name: Continuous Suffering
modifiers.description: Must have taken damage on every turn for the last 3 turns, cannot be caused by Attrition.

modifiers.name: Condition Lock
modifiers.description: Must be afflicted by a condition.

variants.name: Attrition 1
variants.description: Each use costs 15 HP, paid after attack resolves.

modifiers.name: Attrition X
modifiers.description: Each successive use costs additional 15 HP (15, 30, 45, etc.)

modifiers.name: Concussed
modifiers.description: You become stunned until the end of your next turn.

variants.name: Desperation
variants.description: Can only use when an ally is at 25 HP or below.

modifiers.name: Last Resort
modifiers.description: Can only use when 2+ allies are at 25 HP or below.

modifiers.name: Avenger
modifiers.description: Can when an ally is unconscious.
